Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-09-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Neil Hartnett (415.788.7771 or 415.341.4713) Plaintiff in propria persona (audio only).
Laura Atkins (415.781.0145) observing/assisting Plaintiff (audio only).
No other appearances.

Discussed. The Court noted there was no compliance with Tentative Ruling Rule.
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE GOOD LIFE GROCERY's MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY:

Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Objections are waived for failure to timely assert them. Complete responses, without objections, to the requests for production and interrogatories must be served no later than October 28, 2022, unless otherwise agreed by the parties. The requests for admission are DEEMED ADMITTED.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling via email to sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Set For Trial On Dec-12-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
